data.body:
## Description

Add a Prohibited Fix Patterns section to task-execution.md — the active sprint sub-agent prompt template. This reinforces the comprehensive taxonomy established in SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md.

**Add a new section** (between the Rules section and the Prior Batch Discoveries section) with the same 5 anti-patterns:
1. Skipping or removing tests
2. Loosening assertions
3. Broad exception handlers
4. Downgrading error severity
5. Commenting out failing code

**For each pattern**: Pattern name, brief description, and concrete 'Do this instead' alternative. Code examples are optional here (SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md has the detailed examples; this is reinforcement).

**Preserve existing structure**: Do not modify existing sections (Instructions, Rules, Prior Batch Discoveries, File Ownership Boundaries). The new section is additive only.

### Files to modify
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] task-execution.md contains 'Prohibited Fix Patterns' heading
  Verify: grep -q 'Prohibited Fix Patterns' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md
- [ ] All 5 anti-pattern categories present
  Verify: grep -cE 'Skipping or removing tests|Loosening assertions|Broad exception handlers|Downgrading error severity|Commenting out failing code' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
- [ ] Each anti-pattern has a 'Do this instead' alternative
  Verify: grep -c 'Do this instead' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
- [ ] Existing template sections remain intact
  Verify: grep -q '### Instructions' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md && grep -q '### Rules' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md && grep -q '{file_ownership_context}' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md
- [ ] RED tests from Task 1 now pass (GREEN)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python -m pytest tests/skills/test_task_execution_template.py -k 'ProhibitedFixPatterns' --tb=short -q
